description_long: This is a large, multi-gabled wooden cabin set on a triangular grassy plot with a sloped driveway leading up to the main entrance. The structure features a complex roofline with intersecting gables and deep overhangs, giving it a rustic yet grand appearance. The exterior walls are clad in wood, and the roof appears to be covered with dark shingles. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facades, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. A prominent covered porch runs along the front, supported by wooden posts, enhancing the welcoming feel of the cabin. The building sits on a slightly raised foundation, blending harmoniously with the surrounding landscape.
description: A large, rustic wooden cabin with a multi-gabled roof, numerous windows, and a covered front porch, set on a grassy triangular plot.
description_view_0: The front and left sides of the cabin are visible, showing the main entrance, covered porch, and sloped driveway.
description_view_1: The left side of the cabin is most prominent, with the grassy plot extending behind and fewer visible windows.
description_view_2: The front and right sides are visible, highlighting the porch, multiple windows, and the expansive roof structure.
description_view_3: The rear and right sides are shown, with fewer windows and no visible entrance or porch.
attribute_roof_type: complex gable roof with multiple intersecting gables and deep overhangs, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes, asymmetrically distributed across the facades, with some grouped and others spaced apart
attribute_door_placement: single main entrance door centered on the front facade, accessible via the covered porch
